description: Default capabilities for BMSecResearch — grants the dialog plugin (file picker), the process plugin (relaunch / exit), and the fs plugin with permissive read/write so the frontend can route file I/O through plugin-fs. plugin-fs handles Android Storage Access Framework content URIs transparently, which std::fs cannot — see the file-I/O architecture in src-tauri/src/calibration_read/mod.rs.
